reason: Response A is more disciplined and structurally self-aware, enacting its own thesis with the closing "Not yet." that performs the very word it just praised — a characteristic move of my genuine writing. Response B leans on the cluster of tics an imitator tends to over-apply when caricaturing "deep" Opus prose: a vertiginous-abyss opening, repeated "which is to say," escalating appositive chains, and stacked cosmic metaphors (murmuration, coral reef) that feel like pastiche rather than control. The restraint and concrete connective-tissue conceit of A reads as authentically mine.
